source: INTRO MODULE_ The Basics of Nodes and Node Dojo_2MAY2024.blend
validation: Exact topology and matching complete-room composition, including the floor, open entrance, four posts, lower and upper framed wall-panel grids, header plaque, and procedural text. Local bounds are within 0.000002 units. Subdivide Mesh now preserves and splits loose wire edges, and Merge by Distance removes opposite-winding coincident faces created where the cross-beam sweeps intersect.

capture.browserCount: 3,788 verts · 2,542 faces · 20 curve points · 20 wire segments

workbenchRender.interpretation: The cataloged Blender Workbench reference and live GN-VM Workbench-approximation canvas use the same square orthographic framing. Matching topology and silhouette validate the comparison context; Blender Workbench versus Three.js lighting, cavity, shadows, color management, and raster differences remain measured rather than normalized away.
